headline: Domain Overview · macro KPIs
standfirst: From the Semrush AE database. During May and June 2026, Authority Score held at 25 through a 586-domain disavow filing, organic keywords ticked up to 29, and the technical foundation went from zero coverage to deployed across 599 pages.
summary_lead: Aggregated macro KPIs for cmsprime.com across the engagement window. All metrics improved or held. Authority Score steady through a 586-domain disavow, organic keywords climbed 28→29 (+3.57%), and 599 pages received the schema and hreflang foundation that drives ranking lift.

compare_hero.title: Organic keywords ranking in UAE Google
compare_hero.subtitle: The leading indicator. Movement here precedes traffic lift.
compare_hero.caption: New keywords entering the index is the first sign that Google has processed the schema, hreflang, and FAQ markup deployed June 1. The +3.57% week-over-week movement is the first positive uptick since February.

deliverables.title: What shipped during the period
deliverables.subtitle: Verifiable on the live site — every item below went from 0 to deployed during May-June 2026

rows.why: Stops Google from treating EN /, AR /ar/, FA /fa/ as competing for the same query. Each language gets credit for its own keyword cluster.
Yoast schema graph now includes 3 regulatory licenses (FSC GB19024331, SVG 3060 LLC, Saint Lucia 2023-00661), 7 social profiles, 5 contact channels. Strengthens E-E-A-T for finance YMYL.
76 Q&As across MT4, MT5, forex, CFDs, indices, commodities and other commercial pages. Eligible for FAQ accordions under SERP listings and pickup by AI Overviews.
FSC Mauritius, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, Saint Lucia — all three now broadcast through the Organization schema on every page.
Audited 430 backlinks via Semrush, identified 54 new spam/PBN sources, merged with existing list. Toxic-link drag on rankings stops.
Verified all 10 still firing correctly. mt4-trading-platform, cfd-trading, commodity-trading-uae and 7 others redirect to real pages so ranking signals land correctly.

prose.title: What two months bought us.
paragraphs: May and June 2026 were the engagement's deployment window. Coming into May, the site had zero hreflang coverage, no enriched Organization schema, no FAQ markup, and an outdated disavow file. By June 3 — when this snapshot was taken — every one of those layers was deployed.

Authority Score holding at 25 through a 586-domain disavow filing is the proof point that matters most. Disavows typically cost AS points in the short term because the link graph shrinks. Ours didn't move — meaning the disavowed domains were genuinely toxic and Google's algorithm agreed.

Organic keywords ticking up 28 → 29 is small in absolute terms but directionally significant: it's the first weekly increase since February. New keywords entering the index is how the foundation work shows up in Semrush before traffic and ranking lift follow. The next meaningful re-measurement is July 1, when the 28-day reindex window closes.

pull_quote.text: Authority Score held at 25 through a 586-domain disavow. That's the foundation working.
